AUTOMATED · VERIFIED · EXPORT-READY

Metal Conveyor Belts
for OEM Equipment Builders

Built for Partnership.

Robotic welding, in-house wire drawing, and verified production for spiral freezing, food processing, and industrial conveying. YIYI Mesh Belt manufactures metal conveyor belts and matched drive components for OEM equipment builders and professional distributors. From raw wire drawing to finished belt inspection, critical production steps are controlled in-house for long-term stability, consistent quality, and export-ready supply.

WHY OEM BUYERS CHOOSE YIYI Mesh Belt

5 Reasons to Trust
Our Manufacturing

Every claim is backed by visible production assets, process control, and export-ready discipline.

01 / Welding
Robotic Welding Consistency

Uniform weld points for stable belt performance and reduced variation.

→ Reliability built by automation
02 / Material
In-House Wire Drawing

Critical wire processing controlled internally for better consistency and lead-time control.

→ Quality starts at the source
03 / Quality
Verified Quality Control

Inspection, drum verification, and final QA built into key production stages.

→ Every stage checked and confirmed
04 / OEM
OEM Coordination Discipline

Drawing review, sampling, confirmation, and production follow-up for project-based cooperation.

→ Engineered for long-term partnership
05 / Export
Packaging & Export Readiness

Structured packing, export documentation, and global delivery support for long-term supply.

→ Export-ready from day one

APPLICATION SECTORS

Proven Across Food Processing,
Thermal Systems, and Industrial Conveying

YIYI Mesh Belt belt systems are used in demanding applications where stable movement, process compatibility, and service life matter.

❄️

IQF & Spiral Freezing

IQF systems, spiral towers, and continuous freezing lines. Built for stable running under low-temperature, high-duty operation.

Spiral Freezer BeltSelf-Stacker BeltDrive Sprockets
🥩

Meat & Seafood Processing

Food-grade conveying for meat, seafood, poultry, and prepared food lines. Cleanable surfaces and hygienic material options for demanding production.

Eye Link BeltBalanced Weave BeltFlat Wire Honeycomb Conveyor Belts
🥖

Baking & Ovens

Tunnel ovens, cooling conveyors, and biscuit production systems. Designed for dimensional stability and reliable airflow performance.

Flat Wire Honeycomb Conveyor BeltsBalanced Weave BeltChain-Driven Belt
🍪

Snack & Biscuit

Snack conveying, biscuit lines, and cracker production systems. Stable tracking, dimensional consistency, and low-maintenance operation.

Biscuit BeltFlat Wire Honeycomb Conveyor BeltsOEM Specification
🚗

Automotive

Parts washing, surface treatment, and assembly conveying applications. Precision pitch, load stability, and clean manufacturing support.

Eye Link BeltFlat Wire Honeycomb Conveyor BeltsCustom Engineering
🥫

Can Washing

High-volume can and container washing lines. Open-area belt design supports drainage, throughput, and corrosion-resistant performance.

MANUFACTURING PROOF

Automated Manufacturing.
Verifiable Quality.

From wire drawing to final inspection, YIYI Mesh Belt controls critical production stages in-house for consistency, scale, and long-term OEM supply.

Robotic Welding — Consistent weld quality across high-volume production

Key Differentiator

In-House Wire Drawing — Internal wire preparation for tighter control over core material stages

QC & Inspection — Process checks, verification steps, and final QA before shipment

Certifications & Reports — Formal proof available for quality, food-contact safety, and audited compliance

VERIFIED QUALITY SYSTEM

Inspection That Supports
Long-Term Belt Performance

Material control, process inspection, weld verification, and final QA are built into every critical stage.

01

Raw Material Control

Core material quality starts before production begins.

02

Process Inspection

Key production stages are checked for consistency and dimensional control.

03

Drum Test Verification

Critical belt performance is reviewed through practical verification procedures.

04

Final QA Before Shipment

Every project goes through final inspection before packing and export.

05

Food Contact Safety Compliance

Applicable materials and processes supported by formal food-contact safety certification.

ENGINEERING & OEM

From Drawing Review
to Delivery Confirmation

YIYI Mesh Belt supports OEM builders and distributors through drawing-based production, sampling, matched components, quality verification, and export coordination.

01

Drawing Review

Technical requirements are reviewed before production begins.

02

Sampling Process

Sample development confirms structure, fit, and application alignment.

03

Production Confirmation

Specifications, quantities, and process details are aligned before batch production.

04

Matched Components

Drive sprockets and supporting parts are coordinated together when required.

05

Export Packing & Delivery

Packaging and shipping are organized for international OEM projects.

06

Technical Follow-Up

Replacement support and project communication continue after delivery.

Structured OEM coordination, from review to delivery.

PROJECT VALIDATION

Real Installations.
Real Cooperation Proof.

Industrial buyers look for evidence, not slogans. YIYI Mesh Belt supports long-term cooperation through visible project delivery, technical coordination, and repeat supply capability.

Low-Temperature Freezing Projects
Stable belt performance support for low-temperature freezer systems requiring reliable operation and repeat supply consistency.
OEM Repeat Supply Support
Supply coordination for OEM equipment builders who require repeat orders, dimensional consistency, and stable lead-time control.
Replacement & Matching Assistance
Support for replacement projects that require belt matching, old sample review, and coordination with existing conveyor layouts.
Drawing-Based Manufacturing
Production support based on customer drawings, technical specifications, and line requirements for custom conveyor belt projects.
Batch Consistency Control
Controlled manufacturing processes to maintain dimensional stability, repeatability, and quality consistency across multiple production batches.
Export Documentation & Delivery Coordination
Export-oriented support including packaging coordination, shipment documents, and delivery planning for overseas industrial buyers.
